name: Dead Code / Unused Asset Cleaner
description: Fires manually (command). Scans imports vs. assets, lists unused code and assets, and proposes deletions. Reads project-wide; edits only src/.
plan: Find and remove unused code and assets. Scan the project's import graph against the files in src/ and assets/, list every module and asset that is never imported or referenced, and propose the deletions. Apply the deletions to src/ only (do not delete binary assets without explicit confirmation). After deletion, verify no imports are broken by reading the entry module and its transitive imports.

successCriteria.description: No broken imports after the deletions are applied.
